title: Sabichi 5 Speed Hand Mixer, 100 Watt, Black
features: It takes the strain out of mixing
description: Product Description Sabichi introducing the enticing Fruiti cutlery collection. This collection comprises of two different designs of plastic handled cutlery, in a variety of fruity colours. Sabichi tableware brightening up your table settings. Made of stainless steel head and plastic body. Piano key style handle. Available in grape colour. Dishwasher safe. Set includes: 4x knives, 4x forks, 4x dessert spoons, 4x tea spoons. Box Contains 1 x Sabichi 5 Speed Hand Mixer, 100 Watt, Black
